message.content:
@startuml
title Secure Map Reduce 2 - Shuffle Service Token Flow

participant "Client (c)" as c
participant "ResourceManager (rm)" as rm
participant "Node Manager (nm)" as nm
participant "Shuffle Handler (ss)" as ss
participant "Application Master (am)" as am
participant "Application Container (ac)" as ac
participant "Task (t)" as t
participant "File System (fs)" as fs

section "Bootstrap"
    rm -- nm : Bootstrap
endsection

section "Job Definition"
    c -- rm : Job Definition
    c -- rm : createJob [...] () : job-id
    c -- rm : createShuffleToken ( shfl-tkn-mk ) : shfl-tkn
    c -- rm : serializeTokens ( shfl-tkn, ...) : c-tokens{shfl-tkn,...}
endsection

section "Job Submission"
    c -- rm : Job Submission
    c -- rm : submitApplication [...] (job-id, c-tokens{shfl-tkn}, ...) : app-rpt{clnt-tkn}
endsection

section "Job Initiation"
    rm -- nm : Job Initiation
    rm -- am : startContainer [...] ( c-tokens{shfl-tkn},svc-tokens{shfl-tkn}, ...)
    am -- ss : initApp ( job-id, shfl-tkn )
    am -- ac : exec
    nm -- ac : startContainer [...] ( svc-tokens{shfl-tkn}, ...)
    ac -- t : exec
endsection

section "Map Task Execution"
    ac -- fs : Map Task Execution
    ac -- fs : 11 writeShuffleData[]:
endsection

section "Reduce Task Execution"
    ac -- fs : Reduce Task Execution
    ac -- fs : 12 readShuffleData [SDT:shfl-tkn] (...): shfl-data
    ac -- fs : 13 readShuffleData
    ac -- fs : 14 shfl-data
endsection

section "Job Completion"
    c -- rm : Job Completion
endsection

@enduml
